newsTicker: Doon International School – World Class Facility
Join us for Academic Excellence and Holistic Growth

welcome.heading: Welcome to Doon International School, Jabalpur
welcome.subheading: Under the Aegis of Doon International School, Dehradun
paragraphs: Doon International School, Jabalpur is under the aegis of Doon International School, established in 1993, a leading day and residential, senior secondary school located in the Doon Valley catering to the needs of students from all parts of the world.
The curriculum for our school students integrates traditional Indian values with modern educational approaches, creating a comprehensive program designed for holistic academic and personal growth.
The school aims at equipping the students with integrity, courage and compassion to face the challenges of the modern world.

director.title: Director's Message
director.message: Dear Parents, Thank you for showing interest in admitting your child to Doon International School, Jabalpur. We believe our school offers an educational experience that equips every child with confidence, curiosity, and compassion to thrive in the modern world. We look forward to welcoming your child to Doon International School!

campusExperience.subheading: Discover the vibrant life at Doon International School through our world-class facilities, diverse extracurricular activities, and a nurturing environment that fosters growth and excellence

academics.title: Comprehensive Curriculum Excellence
academics.summary: Following a comprehensive integrated curriculum with global perspectives, ensuring students excel in academic achievement and personal development through innovative learning methods.

academics.title: STEM Education Program
academics.summary: Comprehensive Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics program with hands-on learning in robotics, coding, and scientific exploration.

academics.title: Language Arts & Literature
academics.summary: Rich program combining classical literature with contemporary writing, emphasizing communication skills, critical thinking, and literary appreciation.

academics.title: Performing Arts Integration
academics.summary: Integration of music, drama, and dance into the curriculum, fostering creativity, confidence, and emotional expression through artistic endeavors.

academics.title: Sports & Physical Education
academics.summary: Comprehensive physical education program emphasizing health, fitness, teamwork, and character development through various sports and activities.

academics.title: Global Exchange & Cultural Studies
academics.summary: International programs promoting cultural awareness, exchange partnerships, and global citizenship through multicultural education initiatives.
